method: scraped official Vertex AI / Agent Platform pricing page (cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/pricing) via headless browser (agent-browser); Gemini standard <=200K tier; partner models from the Partner-models section, with the Claude region selector switched to EU Multi-Region / europe-west1 for EU rates

models.notes: Preview. Standard tier, <=200K input tokens; >200K tier is $4 in / $18 out. No non-global surcharge shown; Global pricing applies.
Non-global (EU) pricing; Global is $1.50 in / $9.00 out. Non-global GA Gemini 3+ rates take effect 2026-07-01; before then Global applies even to europe-west4. Text/image/video/audio input.
Preview. Text/image/video input; audio input is $1/1M. No non-global surcharge shown.
Non-global (EU) pricing; Global is $0.25 in / $1.50 out. Non-global rates take effect 2026-07-01; before then Global applies. Text/image/video input; audio input $0.55 (non-global).
Standard tier, <=200K input tokens; >200K tier is $2.50 in / $15 out. 2.x family is global (no EU surcharge).
Text/image/video input; audio input is $1/1M.
Text/image/video input; audio input is $0.30/1M.
Token-based pricing; audio input is $1/1M. Batch is half price.
Model Garden partner model. EU Multi-Region (eu) rate (~10% surcharge vs Global $10/$50). Offered in EU Multi-Region; not in europe-west1. >=200K input billed at long-context rates.
Model Garden partner model. EU Multi-Region (eu) rate (Global is $5/$25). Offered in EU Multi-Region; not in europe-west1.
Model Garden partner model. EU Multi-Region (eu) rate (Global is $5/$25). Offered in EU Multi-Region; not in europe-west1.
Model Garden partner model. europe-west1 rate (Global is $5/$25). Offered in europe-west1; not in EU Multi-Region (eu).
Model Garden partner model. europe-west1 rate (Global is $5/$25). Offered in europe-west1; not in EU Multi-Region (eu).
Model Garden partner model. europe-west1 rate (Global is $3/$15). Offered in europe-west1; not in EU Multi-Region (eu).
Model Garden partner model. europe-west1 rate (Global is $3/$15).
Model Garden partner model. europe-west1 rate (Global is $1/$5).
Model Garden partner model. Uniform pricing across all regions (no EU surcharge). No >200K tier.
Model Garden partner model (new). <=200K input tier; >200K is $2.50 in / $5.00 out. No EU regional differentiation listed.
Model Garden partner model (new). <=200K input tier; >200K is $2.50 in / $5.00 out.
Model Garden partner model (new). <=200K input tier; >200K is $2.50 in / $5.00 out.
Model Garden partner model (new). Cache hit $0.05/1M.
Model Garden partner model (new). Cache hit $0.05/1M.
DeepSeek-V3.2. Model Garden partner model. Cache hit $0.056/1M.
DeepSeek-V3.1. Model Garden partner model. Cache hit $0.06/1M.
DeepSeek-R1 (0528). Model Garden partner model.
Model Garden partner model (NEW on Vertex - now has a usable per-token row). Cache hit $0.03/1M.
Kimi-K2-Thinking. Model Garden partner model (NEW on Vertex - Moonshot section added). Cache hit $0.06/1M.
Model Garden partner model (NEW on Vertex - GLM section added). Cache hit $0.1/1M.
Model Garden partner model (NEW on Vertex - GLM section added).
Model Garden partner model.

Model Garden partner model. Cache hit $0.022/1M.

Model Garden partner model (open-weight). Batch is half price.
